API docs by Redocly

Loan Microservice API

Download OpenAPI specification:

rbih-states-controller

changeStatus

path Parameters
id
required
integer <int64>
query Parameters
activate
required
boolean
header Parameters
Accept-Language
string
Default: en

Responses

Generated server url

http://loan-service:8083/api/loan/rbih_states/{id}/status

saveOrUpdateRbihState

header Parameters
Accept-Language
string
Default: en
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>
stateId
integer <int64>
stateCode
string
stateName
string

Responses

Generated server url

http://loan-service:8083/api/loan/rbih_states/save_or_update

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "stateId": 0,
  • "stateCode": "string",
  • "stateName": "string"
}

getAllRBIHBanks

query Parameters
page
integer <int32>
Default: 0
size
integer <int32>
Default: 50
sort
string
Default: "stateName"
order
string
Default: "asc"
header Parameters
Accept-Language
string
Default: en

Responses

Generated server url

http://loan-service:8083/api/loan/rbih_states/all

deleteRbihStateById

path Parameters
id
required
integer <int64>
header Parameters
Accept-Language
string
Default: en

Responses

Generated server url

http://loan-service:8083/api/loan/rbih_states/{id}

query Parameters
loanMasterId

integer <int64>

string
Default: en

required

string

string
cropHoriculture
number
familyConsumption
number
farmMaintaince
number

number

string
bankName
string
loanPurpose
string

string
rateOfInterest
number
fixedOrFloating
string
tenure
number <double>
remark
string
object (LoanRequest)
pacsId
integer <int64>
branchId
integer <int64>
pacsName
string
branchName
string
Array of objects (LoanCropsRepaymemtDto)
sanctionRateOfInterest
number
productName
string
sanctionCashComponent
number

number

isSanctionFifthAmount

string <date-time>

number
kccLimitExpiryDate
string <date-time>

string <date-time>
sanctionValueDate

reasonForSanctionValueDate
string
sanctionLimitYear
integer <int32>

string

saveRenewalLoanDetailFisheryCapture

query Parameters
farmerId
required
integer <int64>
productId
required
integer <int64>
header Parameters
Accept-Language
string
Default: en
Request Body schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (UserProposedCropDetail)
Array of objects (LoanAssets)
Array of objects (LoanGuarantor)
Array of objects (LoanLiabilityGuarantor)
Array of objects (UserLoanLiabilities)
object (LoanSecurity)
Array of objects (LoanLandDetails)

Responses

Generated server url

http://loan-service:8083/api/loan/master/fishery_capture_save_renewal_loan
